options.text: UPDATE `taskqueue` SET `finished` = '1', `result` = 'Running Sync takes longer than 1 minute. Please wait.' WHERE `taskqueue`.`ID` = ${text1};
UPDATE `taskqueue` SET `finished` = '1', `result` = 'Error: Set type does not exist', `timestamp_finished` = '${text2}' WHERE `taskqueue`.`ID` = ${text1};

options.text: Thank you! for Bumping The Plural Alliance, If you are able too leave a review on Disboard we would be ever so grateful ❤️
